Package com.rays.dto

Class FacultyDTO

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseDTO
      • com.rays.dto.FacultyDTO
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    DropdownList
    @Entity
public class FacultyDTO
extends BaseDTO
    FacultyDTO is the Data Transfer Object class for the Faculty entity. This class extends BaseDTO and represents a faculty member in the system.

    This DTO stores faculty details including personal information (name, DOB, gender, phone, email, qualification) and associated college, course, and subject information. It implements the required methods for unique key identification using email address.

    Author:
    sanjana gangrade

      • getUniqueKey

        public java.lang.String getUniqueKey()
        Gets the unique key attribute name for this DTO. The email address serves as the unique key for faculty members.
        Specified by:
        getUniqueKey in class BaseDTO
        Returns:
        "email" as the unique key attribute

      • getUniqueValue

        public java.lang.String getUniqueValue()
        Gets the value of the unique key attribute for this DTO.
        Specified by:
        getUniqueValue in class BaseDTO
        Returns:
        the email address as the unique value

      • getLabel

        public java.lang.String getLabel()
        Gets the display label for this DTO.

        getLabel in class BaseDTO

        Returns:

      • getValue

        public java.lang.String getValue()
        Gets the value for dropdown display. This implementation returns null as faculty members are not typically displayed in dropdowns.
        Returns:
        null
